auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your AI Novel account
auth.signupSuccessMessage: We've sent a confirmation email to {email}. Please click the link to verify your account.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
resetPassword.sentMessage: We've sent a password reset email to {email}. Please click the link to reset your password.

updatePassword.title: Set New Password
updatePassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
updatePassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

home.tagline: AI-assisted long-form novel writing. Generate a Bible draft in 3 minutes, chapter-by-chapter AI drafting with automatic context.
home.featureBibleDesc: From a one-line idea to complete characters, world-building, and chapter outlines.
home.featureDraftDesc: AI drafts based on your Bible and previous chapter context.
home.featureAutosaveDesc: Auto-saves 3 seconds after you stop typing, Ctrl+S for instant save.

novels.title: My Novels
novels.empty: No novels yet. Click above to start creating.

editor.deleteConfirm: Delete Chapter {index} "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
editor.placeholder: Start writing Chapter {index} here. Reference the Bible and chapter outline on the left.
editor.switchConfirm: Current chapter has unsaved changes. Switch anyway?
editor.draftOverwriteConfirm: AI drafting will overwrite unsaved content. Continue?

error.title: Something went wrong
error.defaultMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
